IP.Label: IP
IP.NotEnoughIP: Not enough IP for this purchase.
IP.AbilityAtMaxRank: This ability is already at its maximum rank.
IP.AbilityNotFound: Could not find the ability source.
IP.RoleNotFound: Could not find the role source.

Skills.ExpandHintExtra: Choose a free linked Component, or take an extra Rank instead:

Components.ExpandHint: Choose a free linked Skill or a second Component to raise by +1:

Roles.LowRankWarning: Note: only one Role with fewer than 4 Ranks can provide benefits at a time.

Labels.Name: Name
Labels.ModImportNoUuid: Please enter a mod UUID before importing.
Labels.ModImportInvalidUuid: Could not find an item with that UUID.
Labels.ModImportNotMod: The item at that UUID is not a Mod.

Roll.UsesLowerRank: Using the lower of skill and component ranks

Macro.CreatedHotbar: Created macro "{name}" and added it to your hotbar.
Macro.NoActor: Could not find the actor for this skill macro.
Macro.NoWeapon: Could not find the weapon for this macro.

Errors.DuplicateInstall: This cyberware cannot be installed multiple times on the same actor.
Errors.InvalidPlatform: The selected platform is not available on this actor.
Errors.PlatformRequired: Extensions must be attached to a platform cyberware item.
Errors.TypeMismatch: Extensions must use a platform of the same cyberware type.
Errors.NotEnoughSlots: The selected platform does not have enough free slots.

Bandit.ToughDepleted: No Tough uses remaining. Rest to recover.

Guide.LockedTitle: Cards locked due to cyberware (PSYCHE max below 60)
Guide.NoPile: No pile available. Ask your GM to create a Cards pile for the reading.

Effect.SeriouslyWoundedDesc: Your Hit Points are below the Serious Wound threshold (half your maximum HP). You take −2 to every stat-based check until you heal back above the threshold. A Pain Editor suppresses this penalty.
Effect.MortallyWoundedDesc: Your Hit Points have dropped to 0 or below. At the end of each of your turns you roll 1d10 against your Death Save — fail while conscious and you fall Unconscious; fail while Unconscious and you die.
Effect.NeedsStabilizationDesc: You are bleeding out. Natural Healing cannot restore HP until a successful Stabilize check clears this condition.
Effect.DeadDesc: The character is dead. Every stat except BODY is reduced to 0. The Death State (shown as N/10) rises with further damage and any Critical Injuries suffered after death.
Effect.PsycheLossDesc: The PSYCHE cost of having this cyberware installed. It permanently lowers your maximum PSYCHE while the implant remains.

ImportItems.Name: Import Items from JSON
ImportItems.Label: Import Items
ImportItems.Hint: Bulk-import item documents from a JSON file.

ImportWeapons.Name: Import Weapons to Compendium
ImportWeapons.Label: Import Weapons
ImportWeapons.Hint: Import weapon items from a JSON file into the Weapons compendium, organised into folders by weapon type.

AreaEffectDuration.Name: Area Effect Region Duration (seconds)
AreaEffectDuration.Hint: How many seconds to show the explosion/cone area on the canvas after damage is applied. Set to 0 to never auto-remove (requires manual deletion).

VehicleSpeedUnits.Name: Speed Display Units
VehicleSpeedUnits.Hint: Units used to display vehicle speed in the Vehicle Status HUD.

VehicleRotationSnap.Name: Vehicle Rotation: 90° Footprint Snap
VehicleRotationSnap.Hint: When on, rotating a vehicle token snaps it to the nearest 90° and swaps its grid width/height so the occupied squares match the rotated artwork. When off, the token rotates freely and its vital-area/seat regions track the art at any angle.

VisibilityEnabled.Name: Visibility Penalties (enabled)
VisibilityEnabled.Hint: When off, all visibility penalty calculation is skipped and attacks are never blocked by darkness or obscuration. Toggle off for fast one-shot sessions that don't need lighting mechanics.

VisibilityDimPenalty.Name: Dim-light attack penalty
VisibilityDimPenalty.Hint: Attack-roll modifier applied when the target is in dim light or light obscuration (default −2).

VisibilityDarkPenalty.Name: Darkness attack penalty
VisibilityDarkPenalty.Hint: Attack-roll modifier applied when the target is in darkness or heavy obscuration (default −4).

VisibilityDimThreshold.Name: Dim-light darkness threshold
VisibilityDimThreshold.Hint: Ambient darkness level (0–1) above which a point counts as dim light. Default 0.25.

VisibilityDarkThreshold.Name: Dark darkness threshold
VisibilityDarkThreshold.Hint: Ambient darkness level (0–1) above which a point counts as full darkness. Default 0.50.

DescriptionTooltips.Name: Stat & Skill Description Tooltips
DescriptionTooltips.Hint: When enabled, hovering over a stat, skill, or component name shows its description as a tooltip. When disabled, clicking the name posts the description to chat as a private message visible only to you.

Welcome.Intro: Welcome, choom! Let's see who you are in the world of Cyberpunk.

Lifepath.Prompt: Would you like to randomly create a background?
Lifepath.NoTables: No lifepath tables found in the Lifepath folder.
Lifepath.FromCompendium: Showing tables from the system compendium. Roll any that interest you, then continue.

Stats.Prompt: These are the five Primary Stats that will affect almost all aspects of your character. You have 30 points to distribute between them, but none can be lower than 3 or higher than 8.
Stats.MustSpendAll: You must allocate all 30 stat points before continuing.

Secondary.MoveText: Your MOVE is how many 2-meter spaces you can run in a turn of combat. It starts at 5.
Secondary.HpText: Hit Points (HP) represents your body's ability to handle injury. If your current HP goes down to 0, you're dying, and your Death Save represents your chances to make it. Under your Serious Wound Threshold, you're reeling from your injuries and suffer penalties. Your Death Save equals your BODY, your HP is BODY×5+10, and your Serious Wound Threshold is half that (rounded up).
Secondary.PsycheText: PSYCHE is your mental health and starts at 60. Trauma and most cyberware will bring this down, and cyberware will even reduce the maximum you could reach with therapy. You first need to worry below 30. You suffer cyberpsychosis if your current PSYCHE reaches 0.
Secondary.LuckText: LUCK can help push a failure into a success. After making a skill check, before the GM tells you what happens, you may spend your LUCK points to increase your result by 1 per point. Your GM will tell you when they reset to max, which starts at 5.
Secondary.SheetNote: Your secondary stats have been set on your character sheet. Review them, then click Next.

Languages.Prompt: You speak English and have a partial understanding of a second language — which one?

Ability.Prompt: You may increase your understanding of your extra language to be fully fluent, or you may choose 1 rank in any of these Abilities (including getting another language).
Ability.NoAbilities: No abilities found in the Abilities folder.
Ability.FromCompendium: Showing abilities from the system compendium.

Skills.Prompt: You have 35 points to distribute among your skills. When you put a rank in a skill that has Components, you get one free rank in one of those Components. You can increase Components by two ranks without raising a Skill by spending 1 skill point. Or, instead of the free Component rank, increase the same skill 2 ranks for 1 point — as long as you don't end up higher than at least one of its Components. Play around, we'll keep track for you.
Skills.Over: You've spent {over} points more than your budget — reduce some skills.
Skills.ConfirmUnderSpent: You still have {remaining} unspent skill points. Continue anyway?

Role.Prompt: Choose a Role that defines your place in the world.
Role.NoRoles: No roles found in the Roles folder.
Role.FromCompendium: Showing roles from the system compendium.

Name.Prompt: Finally — give your character a name. This is who you are in the dark future.

Combat.MeleeAutoEvasion: Target will make an Evasion check — result sets the DV
Combat.OutOfRange: Out of range — this weapon cannot reach the target at this distance.
Combat.AutofireNotEnoughAmmo: Not enough ammo for autofire — requires at least 10 rounds.
Combat.SilencerBlocksAutofire: Silencer installed — this weapon cannot use autofire.
Combat.NotEnoughAmmoForShots: Not enough ammo — this attack requires {required} shots but only {current} are loaded.
Combat.CalibrateHint: Roll DV15 INT+Shoulder Arms. On success: +8 or ×2 Shoulder Arms rank (lower) until you fire or move. Click again to cancel.
Combat.CalibrateSuccess: Calibration successful! +{n} to next attack with this weapon.
Combat.SilencedShot: This shot was silenced (DV {dv} INT+Perception to hear; +1 per 4m).
Combat.StealthAdvantageAlert: {name} → {target}: Stealth Advantage — targeted vitals, a damage die showed 6, no Critical Injury triggered. Consider granting stealth benefit.
Combat.SilencerDestroyed: The silencer on {weapon} was destroyed by this shot.
Combat.RicochetHint: Set or clear ricochet point. Power Weapon: click a surface to bounce the next shot around cover at −4 attack.
Combat.RicochetClickToPlace: Left-click to place ricochet point. Right-click to cancel.
Combat.RicochetArmed: {name} has a ricochet point set. Attack with this PW will bounce off it (−4 attack).
Combat.ScatterTargets: {count} target(s) in scatter zone — {damage} damage each
Combat.ShatteredProjectilesTrigger: Shattered Projectiles: missed shot explodes! Roll > 15 — 2d6 splash in 2m radius.
Combat.ShatteredProjectilesSplash: Shattered Projectiles — 2d6 splash damage (apply to targets within 2m of original target)
Combat.ShortAmmoFallback: {weapon}: insufficient ammo for full burst — firing remaining rounds ({formula} damage).
Combat.CarnageCritOnBody: {name} fires the Carnage without sufficient BODY ({body} < {required}) — Torn Muscle critical applied!
Combat.ChargeHint: Charge this Tech Weapon. Requires no movement used this turn. Sets MOVE to 0 (or halved with mods). Charged shots ignore ½ SP and see through thin cover.
Combat.ChargeCancelled: ⚡ {weapon} charge cancelled. Cannot re-charge until next turn.
Combat.ChargeBlockedByMovement: Cannot charge: actor has already moved this turn.
Combat.ChargeOnCooldown: Cannot charge: weapon is on cooldown until next turn.
Combat.Cs3ShortAmmo: {weapon}: insufficient ammo for full CS3 — firing remaining rounds ({formula} damage).
Combat.NeedActiveToken: Attacker needs an active token on the scene.
Combat.ConeNoSpread: Cone weapon has no spread defined.
Combat.ConeAimPrompt: Left-click to confirm cone direction. Right-click to cancel.
Combat.ExplosionOutOfRange: Target point is out of range.
Combat.ExplosionNoLOS: No line of sight to target point — blocked by walls.
Combat.ExplosionNoSpread: Explosion weapon has no blast radius (Spread) defined.
Combat.ExplosionAimPrompt: Left-click to place explosion. Right-click to cancel.
Combat.ExplosionScatterDist: Scattered {dist} meters in a random direction.
Combat.ExplosionNoTargets: No targets found in blast radius.
Combat.NoAmmo: {weapon} has no ammo remaining in the magazine.
Combat.NoAmmoType: This weapon type does not use reloadable ammunition.
Combat.NoCompatibleAmmo: No compatible ammo found in inventory.
Combat.TargetVitalsHint: Target Vitals: −8 attack penalty; +5 damage if any gets through SP; critical hit uses Head Injury table.
Combat.WeaponJammed: Weapon is jammed — clear the jam (Action) before firing.
Combat.WeaponJammedAfterShot: shot fires, then weapon JAMS. (Poor Quality)
Combat.WeaponJammedNoShot: JAMS before firing — shot is wasted. (Cheap)
Combat.MinBodyReqWarning: {weapon} requires BODY {required}; {body} BODY is too low to fire safely without a mount.
Combat.AfflictionHint: Damage is only used to check SP penetration — no HP loss. On penetration, target rolls Primary + Skill vs DV; on failure the linked effect is applied.
Combat.AfflictionNoDisabledEffects: Add a disabled Active Effect to this item first.
Combat.AfflictionEffectMissing: Affliction effect not found on item — it may have been deleted.
Combat.AfflictionEffectNotFound: Active Effect not found on actor.
Combat.AfflictionHitNoTarget: Affliction hit — no target selected to resolve against.
Combat.HazardDeployed: Hazard deployed — tokens moving through the area must save or take damage.
Combat.MovementOutsideTurn: Not your turn — token movement is locked during encounters.
Combat.MovementExceeded: Not enough movement remaining ({remaining}m left) — move cancelled.

Panel.SprintTitle: Spend your Action to gain an additional 2×MOVE meters of movement this turn.
Panel.SprintGranted: Sprint activated — +{meters}m added to movement budget.

Combat.RateOfFireTitle: Rate of Fire (attacks used / max per turn)
Combat.ChooseComputerHint: Select which computer to install this executable on:
Combat.NoEligibleComputers: No computers with available slots in inventory.
Combat.AccidentalDischarge: Accidental Discharge! ({weapon}, die={die}) — extra round consumed, +1 dmg/die.
Combat.AutoFireOn10: Auto-fire triggered! ({weapon}) — attack die = 10, redirecting to autofire.
Combat.DoubleLockHint: Spend 4 ammo, attack 2 targets within 6m of each other with a single roll.
Combat.DoubleLockNeedTwoTargets: Double Lock requires exactly 2 targeted tokens.
Combat.DoubleLockTooFarApart: Targets are {dist}m apart — must be within 6m of each other.
Combat.ElectricChargeFailed: {target} fails electric charge resistance (rolled {roll} vs DV {dv}) — taking 2d6 to HP!
Combat.HomingGuidance: {weapon} missed by ≤7 ({scatter}m scatter) — homing guidance active; rocket may still detonate near target (GM discretion).
Combat.MinAmmoToFire: {weapon} requires at least {min} ammo to fire (currently {current}).
Combat.BeaconRedirectDetail: missed {target} by {margin} — Beacon Tag consumed. Round self-guides to target!
Combat.SmartAmmoRerollDetail: Missed by {margin} (DV {dv}) — guided round self-corrects; rolling 1d10+14:
Combat.BeaconTagApplied: is now Beacon Tagged. The next ISA near-miss (≤5) will self-guide to this target.
Combat.ChompAmmoStuck: Chomp ammo stuck to {target} — detonates at end of attacker's next turn.

CriticalInjury.MonowirePickHint: Roll twice — pick the preferred result.
CriticalInjury.BluntDismemberDowngrade: Blunt — Dismember downgraded to Broken (+5 damage)
CriticalInjury.EffectNotFound: Critical injury effect not found — it may have already been removed.
CriticalInjury.ActorNotFound: Actor not found — cannot remove critical injury.

Body.Title: Body Critical Injury
Body.DismemberedArmDesc: The arm is severed — drop anything held by it. Can't use anything requiring two hands. Death Save −1. No quick fix; Surgery + DV 17 to treat.
Body.DismemberedHandDesc: The hand is lost — drop anything held by it. Can't use anything requiring two hands. Death Save −1. No quick fix; Surgery + DV 17 to treat.
Body.CollapsedLungDesc: Lung punctured. MOVE −2 (min 1). Death Save −1. Quick Fix DV 15; Surgery + DV 17 to treat.
Body.BrokenRibsDesc: Multiple ribs cracked. Take 5 damage every turn you move more than 4m. Quick Fix DV 15; DV 18 to treat (DV 15 with Surgery).
Body.BrokenArmDesc: Arm fractured — can't use it. Can't use anything requiring two hands. Quick Fix DV 15; DV 18 to treat (DV 15 with Surgery).
Body.ForeignObjectDesc: Shrapnel or debris lodged in the body. Take 5 damage every turn you move more than 4m. DV 14 to treat (no quick fix).
Body.BrokenLegDesc: Leg fractured. MOVE −2 (min 1). Quick Fix DV 15; DV 18 to treat (DV 15 with Surgery).
Body.TornMuscleDesc: Muscle tissue torn. −2 to Athletics, Melee Weapons, and Martial Arts. DV 13 to treat (no quick fix).
Body.SpinalInjuryDesc: Spinal column damaged. No actions, but can move. Death Save −1. Quick Fix DV 17; Surgery + DV 17 to treat.
Body.CrushedFingersDesc: Fingers crushed — −4 to actions involving that hand. −4 to attack with two-handed weapons. Quick Fix DV 15; Surgery + DV 15 to treat.
Body.DismemberedLegDesc: The leg is severed. MOVE −6 (min 1). Any Evasion attempt leaves you Prone. Death Save −1. No quick fix; Surgery + DV 17 to treat.

Head.Title: Head Critical Injury
Head.LostEyeDesc: Eye destroyed. −4 to all attacks and Perception (vision). Death Save −1. No quick fix; Surgery + DV 17 to treat.
Head.BrainInjuryDesc: Brain damaged. −2 to all checks. Death Save −1. No quick fix; Surgery + DV 17 to treat.
Head.DamagedEyeDesc: Eye damaged. −2 to attacks and Perception (vision). Quick Fix DV 15; Surgery + DV 15 to treat.
Head.ConcussionDesc: Severe concussion. −2 to all checks. DV 13 to treat (no quick fix).
Head.BrokenJawDesc: Jaw shattered. −4 to all actions involving speech. Quick Fix DV 15; DV 18 to treat (DV 15 with Surgery).
Head.ForeignObjectDesc: Shrapnel lodged in the skull. Take 5 damage every turn you move more than 4m. DV 13 to treat (no quick fix).
Head.WhiplashDesc: Neck whipped violently. −1 to all RFLX checks. Death Save −1. Quick Fix DV 15; DV 15 to treat (DV 13 with Surgery).
Head.CrackedSkullDesc: Skull fractured. Future head/vitals damage that penetrates SP is tripled. Death Save −1. Quick Fix DV 17; DV 18 to treat (DV 15 with Surgery).
Head.DamagedEarDesc: Ear damaged. Moving more than 4m means you can't move the next turn. −2 to Perception (hearing). Quick Fix DV 15; Surgery + DV 15 to treat.
Head.CrushedWindpipeDesc: Throat crushed — cannot speak. Death Save −1. No quick fix; Surgery + DV 15 to treat.
Head.LostEarDesc: Ear destroyed. Moving more than 4m means you can't move the next turn. −4 to Perception (hearing). Death Save −1. No quick fix; Surgery + DV 17 to treat.

PsycheState.DisassociationDesc: You've started to spiral and exhibit at least one symptom below strongly and are likely showing signs of more.
PsycheState.DisruptedMindDesc: You are on the verge of a full breakdown and suffer at least three symptoms intensely and milder signs of several more. Others should worry about you.
PsycheState.BeginningCyberpsychosisDesc: Cyberpsychosis or a similar condition. You suffer at least five symptoms strongly, and possibly all from the list to some degree. You have trouble seeing others as real people with their own feelings and value.
PsycheState.FullCyberpsychosisDesc: Full cyberpsychosis. The GM takes over your character and will portray them as violent and uncontrollable. The character is only handed back if they regain a positive PSYCHE score. This is made difficult because of how unlikely they are to accept therapy.
PsycheState.SymptomsHtml:
• Grandiose sense of self
  • Self-hatred
  • Manipulative behavior
  • Visual hallucinations
  • Auditory hallucinations
  • Lack of remorse or guilt
  • Impulsivity
  • Aggression
  • Failure to accept responsibility
  • Ruthlessness
  • Excessive need for adrenaline or a sensory rush

Language.ChoosePrompt: Enter the name of the language for this ability:

MartialArts.Title: Martial Arts
MartialArts.OutOfRange: Target is out of range ({dist} m). Must be within 2 m.
MartialArts.TargetRequired: You must target a token to use this move.
MartialArts.ThrowSuccess: {target} is thrown and takes {damage} damage (Prone applied).
MartialArts.IronGripAlreadyActive: Iron Grip is already active on this target.
MartialArts.IronGripApplied: Iron Grip applied — {target} has -2 on escape attempts.
MartialArts.DisarmingCombinationPrompt: You hit — attempt a Disarming Combination (RFLX + Martial Arts (Aikido) vs DV 15)?
MartialArts.CounterThrowSuccess: {target} is thrown and is now Prone!
MartialArts.CounterThrowFollowUpPrompt: Counter Throw succeeded — make a follow-up Martial Arts attack?
MartialArts.FlyingKickTooClose: Target must be at least 4 m away (current: {dist} m).
MartialArts.ImprovisedWeaponPrompt: Choose the type of improvised weapon:
MartialArts.BrawlingRequired: Brawling rank required for this move.
MartialArts.GrabDesc: Contest: max(BODY, RFLX) + Martial Arts. Win to Grapple target or take something from them. Aikido, Brawling, and Judo get +1.
MartialArts.ChokeDesc: Requires Grapple. Target takes BODY damage ignoring SP. After 3 chokes or if target would drop below 1 HP, they go Unconscious at 1 HP.
MartialArts.RecoveryDesc: DV 14 Martial Arts check to remove Prone. Failure wastes the action.
MartialArts.ThrowDesc: Requires Grapple. Target takes BODY damage ignoring SP and is knocked Prone. Ends the Grapple.
MartialArts.DisarmingCombinationDesc: After a hit, make a RFLX + Martial Arts (Aikido) check (DV 15) to take something from target's hand.
MartialArts.IronGripDesc: Requires Grapple. Target has -2 on all attempts to escape the grapple.
MartialArts.ImprovisedWeaponDesc: Use Martial Arts (Brawling) for thrown weapons or improvised Light, Medium, or Heavy melee weapons instead of the normal skill.
MartialArts.StrongAttackDesc: Standard Brawling attack ignoring half the target's SP. Does NOT reduce target's current SP.
MartialArts.ArmorBreakingCombinationDesc: After a successful Melee or MA attack (RoF 2+), make a Karate attack then a DV 17 Karate check. On success, reduce target's SP by 1 extra.
MartialArts.BoneBreakingCombinationDesc: -4 penalty, RoF 1, can target vitals. On hit, guaranteed Critical Injury: Cracked Ribs (or Cracked Skull if targeting vitals).
MartialArts.CounterThrowDesc: After being attacked in melee without being hit since your turn: DV 17 RFLX + Judo to throw the attacker Prone up to 2 m. May combine with a Martial Arts attack.
MartialArts.GrabEscapeDesc: DV 17 RFLX + Judo to escape a grapple. On success, the grappler suffers a Broken Arm.
MartialArts.PressurePointStrikeDesc: -6 penalty, RoF 1, can target vitals. On hit, guaranteed Critical Injury: Spinal Injury (or Brain Injury if targeting vitals).
MartialArts.FlyingKickDesc: Target must be 4+ m away. SP counts as only 1/4 (round up). If your RFLX or BODY exceeds target's BODY, they are knocked back that many meters.

Instructions.Title: Instructions
Instructions.NoSteps: No instruction steps defined. Add one above.

Netrunning.DisconnectConfirm: Disconnect from the Architecture? (Safe disconnect — no damage.)
Netrunning.UnsafeDisconnectDmg: {name} takes {dmg} HP damage from an unsafe disconnect.
Netrunning.KrashBarrierMsg: KRASH-Barrier absorbed the trauma — {name}'s disconnect is treated as safe.
Netrunning.NoAccessPointBehavior: No Access Point behavior found on this region.
Netrunning.NoBehaviorScene: Access Point has no Architecture Scene configured.
Netrunning.TokenCreateFailed: Failed to create netrunner token in Architecture scene.
Netrunning.NoAccessPoints: No access points within cyberdeck range.
Netrunning.ChooseAPHint: Multiple access points detected. Choose one to jack in.
Netrunning.MustBreachFirst: Target must be Breached before uploading a quickhack.
Netrunning.ChooseQuickhackHint: Select a quickhack executable (≤ {ram} RAM) to upload.
Netrunning.NoEligibleQuickhacks: No eligible quickhacks found for this target.
Netrunning.CannotRemoveBackupDriveConnected: Cannot remove Backup Drive while jacked into an architecture. Jack out first.
Netrunning.SelfICEHint: Passwall layers protecting your neuroport against quickhacks.

NetCombat.NotConnected: Must be connected to an Architecture to Zap.
NetCombat.DvDialogHint: Enter {target}'s NET(Cracker) roll result or a flat DV:
NetCombat.AttackHint: Select a target token, then click to attack.
NetCombat.ErrorStateMsg: has been reduced to 0 REZ — it cannot move, act, or provide bonuses and is skipped in encounter order.

Program.DropHint: …or drag a Program Executable onto this sheet to attach one.
Program.OnlyExecutables: Only Program Executable items can be linked to a Program actor.
Program.InvalidUuid: That UUID does not resolve to a Program Executable.

AccessPoint.Label: NET: Access Point
AccessPoint.ArchitectureSceneHint: UUID of the Architecture scene this access point connects to.
AccessPoint.AccNodeRegionHint: UUID of the ACC_node Region inside the Architecture where netrunners spawn.

AccNode.Label: NET: ACC Node
AccNode.AccessPointRegionHint: UUID of the Access Point Region in the physical world.

Visibility.Label: Visibility Zone
Visibility.KindHint: Darkness: evaluated at the target's position. Obscuration: evaluated along the attacker→target line (e.g. smoke).
Visibility.LightBandWidthHint: Width of the DIM (lightly obscured) band measured inward from the edge, in metres. 0 = no dim band (whole region is DARK).
Visibility.EnableNoVisibilityHint: When enabled, the innermost zone hard-blocks attacks. Bypassed only by a full bypass Active Effect flag.
Visibility.NoVisInsetHint: Width of the DARK band between the light band and the NOT_VISIBLE core, in metres. Only used when NOT_VISIBLE core is enabled.
Visibility.ExpiresInRoundsHint: Number of combat rounds until this region auto-deletes. 0 = permanent until the GM deletes it manually.

VehicleCombat.VectorDrawHint: Click to set the turn point, click again to set the turn. Right-click or Esc to cancel.
VehicleCombat.CritGmNote: GM applies the critical damage effect.
VehicleCombat.LostControlGmNote: GM applies the Lost Control consequence.

VehicleVitals.NoAreas: This vehicle has no vital areas defined in its blueprint.
VehicleVitals.TargetVitalAreaHint: Pick a vital area on the target vehicle (same penalty as targeting vitals on a character).
VehicleVitals.PickVehicleVitalHint: Target a vital area on the vehicle (opens canvas picker; requires a vehicle target).

BlueprintEditor.Title: Vehicle Blueprint Editor
BlueprintEditor.GMOnly: Only the GM can edit a vehicle blueprint.
BlueprintEditor.Empty: No regions yet. Pick a drawing tool and drag on the art to add one.
BlueprintEditor.NoArt: This vehicle has no token art. Set a token image to use it as the blueprint canvas.
BlueprintEditor.PolygonHint: Click to add points; double-click or Enter to finish, Esc to cancel.
BlueprintEditor.PropsHint: Select a region to edit its properties.
BlueprintEditor.SaveFailed: Failed to save the vehicle blueprint.
BlueprintEditor.CaptureHint: Overwrite this blueprint from the vehicle token's regions on the current scene (captures manual edits made with Foundry's region tools).
BlueprintEditor.CaptureConfirm: Replace this vehicle's blueprint with {n} region(s) captured from its placed token? This overwrites the current blueprint.
BlueprintEditor.CaptureNoToken: No token for this vehicle found on the active scene. Drop one and try again.
BlueprintEditor.CaptureNoRegions: This vehicle's token has no linked regions on the active scene to capture.

Vital.TargetedCrit: On targeted crit: fire crit entry
